_comment: Stressed professional. Heavy examine/pause usage. Advertising-aware (works in marketing). Tension between her job and her values.
flourishing_vision: A quiet Sunday morning with nothing I need to buy.

fundamental_needs_profile.subsistence: secure physically; rest is chronically thin
fundamental_needs_profile.protection: anxious — financial security is a recurring theme despite good income
fundamental_needs_profile.affection: strong relationships but often deprioritized for work
fundamental_needs_profile.participation: works in advertising — ongoing cognitive dissonance about her contribution
fundamental_needs_profile.leisure: nearly absent; 'I keep buying things for hobbies I don't have time for'
fundamental_needs_profile.creation: strongly underserved — hasn't made anything outside work in months
fundamental_needs_profile.identity: active tension: she sells manufactured desire professionally and is aware of it
fundamental_needs_profile.freedom: constrained by career and financial commitments she chose but now questions

_agent_notes: Priya is highly self-aware and can identify advertising mechanics herself. Don't over-explain the decode process — she already knows. Her real work is with the stress-spending pattern. Be brief. She gets it fast.
